title: hieracium ctenodon subsp. tenuisquamum
intro: Hieracium ctenodon subsp. tenuisquamum, a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Traditionally, it has been used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of inflammation, such as pain and swelling. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
